rulings.Case Title: JOHN ORF et al VS. K & S CO., INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 1, PLAINTIFFS JOHN ORF, KYLE ORFMotion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint. Is continued to 5/14/2010 for plaintiff to provide courtesy copies of moving papers with cover letter regarding new hearing date. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: ROYOCO CONSTRUCTION VS. FAR EAST NATIONAL BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 2, DEFENDANT THYSSENKRUPP ELEVATOR CORPORATION, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Is sustained with leave to amend. (1) Plaintiff to state which causes of action apply to which defendant; (2) Plaintiff to plead ultimate facts as to each defendant. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: MARJORIE DELA CRUZ VS. MIA LUCERO et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 8, DEFENDANTS VEDASTO LUCERO, MASTUELA LUCERO MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. Is continued to 5/11/2010 for courtesy copies of moving papers. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: JANE DOE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer is overruled, 10 days to answer. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CHEUNG KWAI KEE ENTERPRISES DBA HING LUNG VS. MING CHEONG CORPORATION DBA NEW KING TIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 4, PLAINTIFF CHEUNG KWAI KEE ENTERPRISES DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. Is continued to June 7, 2010 for Defendant to revive corporate status and provide court with documentation evidencing revived status. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CHEUNG KWAI KEE ENTERPRISES DBA HING LUNG VS. MING CHEONG CORPORATION DBA NEW KING TIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 4, PLAINTIFF CHEUNG KWAI KEE ENTERPRISES MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Is continued to June 7, 2010 for Defendant to revive corporate status and provide court with documentation evidencing revived status. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES BURDEN VS. SELECTQUOTE INSURANCE SERVICES, A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 5, PLAINTIFF CHARLES BURDEN DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer is overruled. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: ALAN HAVASSY VS. TRINITY SAN FRANCISCO, L.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 6, DEFENDANTS TRINITY SAN FRANCISCO, L.P., TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer sustained with leave to amend 2nd cause of action to plead facts regarding notice of breach of habitability. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to the 3rd cause of action. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: ALAN HAVASSY VS. TRINITY SAN FRANCISCO, L.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 6, DEFENDANTS TRINITY SAN FRANCISCO, L.P., TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES Motion to Strike Portions of Plaintiff's Complaint. Motion to strike punitive damages granted. Motion to strike attorneys fees granted. =(302/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: GALASSI ENTERPRISES,LLC VS. STEPHANIE O'DRISCOLL et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 11, 2010, line 7, PLAINTIFF GALASSI ENTERPRISES, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Is continued to May 14, 2010; opposition is due May 11, 2010, with courtesy copies to the Court. =(302/EHG)
